retrieved_note: Re-verified 2026-05-25 against MCB Islamic Jan-Jun 2026 Schedule of Bank Charges (Section O, Digital Banking) and the official UnionPay/PayPak and Visa debit-card product pages, plus the Shandaar and Prime account-package pages in the same SOBC.

cards.card_name: MCB Islamic Qadar Classic Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Shandaar Account waives first issuance for PayPak / UPI Classic / UPI Gold variants (replacement and annual/renewal still charged); PayFlex Premier/Grand/Executive packages waive new and annual/renewal fees for UPI Classic when the published salary/Employee-Banking criteria are met.

notes: Annual / Issuance / Replacement fee is PKR 3,250 + FED per the Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC (Section O.4, MCB Islamic UnionPay Debit Card table). Corrected from previous value of PKR 2,600.
Shandaar Account page and SOBC entry 22 confirm first issuance is free for PayPak / UPI Classic / UPI Gold for individuals only; annual/renewal still charged at SOBC rate.
Public debit-card pages publish no salary or minimum-balance requirement, and the SOBC does not impose one for non-Platinum variants; salary/balance left null (not 0) per methodology.
Card is account-linked: requires a singly operated MCB Islamic PKR account.

cards.card_name: MCB Islamic Qadar Gold Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Shandaar Account waives first issuance for PayPak / UPI Classic / UPI Gold variants (replacement and annual/renewal still charged); PayFlex Premier/Grand/Executive packages waive new and annual/renewal fees for UPI Gold when the published salary/Employee-Banking criteria are met.

notes: Annual / Issuance / Replacement fee is PKR 4,000 + FED per the Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC (Section O.4, MCB Islamic UnionPay Debit Card table). Corrected from previous value of PKR 3,200.
Shandaar Account page and SOBC entry 22 confirm first issuance is free for PayPak / UPI Classic / UPI Gold for individuals only; annual/renewal still charged at SOBC rate.
Public debit-card pages publish no salary or minimum-balance requirement; salary/balance left null per methodology.
Card is account-linked: requires a singly operated MCB Islamic PKR account.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Prime accountholders receive 12 months of free UPI Platinum annual/renewal if a PKR 3,000,000 monthly average deposit balance is maintained in 6 of the previous 12 months; otherwise charged per SOBC.

notes: Annual / Issuance / Replacement fee is PKR 9,600 + FED per the Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC (Section O.4, MCB Islamic UnionPay Debit Card table). Corrected from previous value of PKR 7,750.
SOBC Platinum Debit Card Renewal Criteria require a minimum account balance of PKR 1,000,000 to be issued and a 90-day average of PKR 1,000,000 to continue; if not maintained the card is downgraded.
Shandaar Account waiver explicitly excludes Platinum; Prime-account waiver applies as captured in the waiver rule.
Card is account-linked: requires a singly operated MCB Islamic PKR account meeting the PKR 1M balance threshold.

cards.card_name: MCB Islamic PayPak Classic Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Shandaar Account waives first issuance for PayPak / UPI Classic / UPI Gold variants for individuals (replacement and annual/renewal still charged); PayFlex Regular/Premier/Grand/Executive packages waive new and annual/renewal fees for PayPak when the published salary/Employee-Banking criteria are met.

notes: Annual / Issuance / Replacement fee is PKR 2,750 + FED per the Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC (Section O.4, MCB Islamic PayPak Debit Card table). Corrected from previous value of PKR 2,200.
PayPak is typically issued against Asaan-tier accounts; Asaan Current and Asaan Digital Current pages show PKR 100 initial deposit and no minimum balance.
Shandaar Account waiver covers PayPak first issuance only (individuals); annual/renewal still charged.
Card is account-linked: requires an MCB Islamic PKR account (Asaan-tier accounts most common).

cards.card_name: MCB Islamic Visa Classic Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Shandaar accountholders can have the Visa Classic issuance fee reversed if a PKR 100,000 monthly average balance is maintained in the three months following card issuance; the reversal applies to first issuance only — replacement and annual/renewal are charged per SOBC.

notes: Annual / Issuance / Renewal / Replacement fee is PKR 3,400 + FED per the Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC (Section O.4, MCB Islamic VISA Debit Card table). Corrected from previous value of PKR 2,950.
Visa Classic page eligibility: all singly operated PKR accounts for individual / joint (primary) / sole proprietor customers.

Shandaar VDC reversal is explicit in SOBC entry 22 (Visa Classic and Gold only): PKR 100K monthly average balance for 3 months from card issuance; existing Shandaar customers must have maintained PKR 100K in the prior 3 months.
Card is account-linked: requires a singly operated MCB Islamic PKR account.

gaps: MCB Islamic does not appear to publish a consumer credit-card catalogue; this pilot covers debit cards only.
Public debit-card pages and the SOBC do not publish per-card minimum monthly salary or minimum age thresholds (except for the PKR 1M balance gate on Platinum); salary and age fields remain null.
Bank does not publish per-card income-document requirements separately from account-opening requirements; income_document_required left null.
